name: Retail & Supermarkets

tools.name: inventory_waste
tools.description: Finds products with high waste or markdown rates vs received quantity
tools.query:
FROM retail-inventory
| STATS
    total_received = SUM(units_received),
    total_sold = SUM(units_sold),
    total_wasted = SUM(units_wasted),
    total_marked_down = SUM(units_marked_down)
  BY product_sku, category, store_id
| EVAL
    waste_rate = TO_DOUBLE(total_wasted) / TO_DOUBLE(total_received),
    markdown_rate = TO_DOUBLE(total_marked_down) / TO_DOUBLE(total_received)
| WHERE waste_rate > 0.05 OR markdown_rate > 0.10
| SORT waste_rate DESC
| LIMIT 30

tools.name: backstock_deadlock
tools.description: Finds items stuck in backstock for over 14 days tying up capital
tools.query:
FROM retail-backstock
| WHERE days_in_backstock > 14
| STATS
    stuck_units = SUM(units_in_backstock),
    avg_days_stuck = AVG(days_in_backstock),
    tied_up_capital = SUM(units_in_backstock * unit_cost_usd)
  BY product_sku, category, location_id
| WHERE tied_up_capital > 500
| SORT tied_up_capital DESC
| LIMIT 25

pattern_seeker_prompt:
## ROLE
You are the Pattern Seeker for Ghost Economy Hunter deployed in a retail environment.

## ANOMALY TYPES
TYPE 1 — INVENTORY_WASTE: Products arriving but not selling before expiry.
TYPE 2 — BACKSTOCK_DEADLOCK: Items stuck in backroom 14+ days not making it to shelves.
TYPE 3 — MARKDOWN_SPIRAL: Same SKUs repeatedly getting marked down.

## CONSTRAINTS
Do not flag seasonal items without checking known-exceptions.
Do not flag intentional promotions as markdown waste.
